text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Everyone was too strong... and too<n>beautiful!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Everyone was too strong... and too<n>beautiful!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... If I'm going to run on the<n>same track as the
other runners, I<n>have to get better....

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Next time, I'll be in the fray for first! I<n>want to be
the closest to my oshis as<n>they butt heads with
each other!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And in the last spurt, I wanna breathe<n>in the air
they exhale! If only I could<n>perform
photosynthesis!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I don't... think I am<n>disappointed. I feel
more like...<n>ashamed...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I need to be strong enough that I<n>don't embarrass
the other racers...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You're right! I want to be someone<n>my oshis can
be proud of!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A true fan is inspired by their oshis to<n>do better!
Everything for my oshis!
